### GWAS summary statistics 文件进行标准化预处理（Munge）
```{r}
library(MungeSumstats)

infile  <- "/mnt/alamo01/users/dengys/Project/jupyter/prepare/GWAS/GCST90027163_buildGRCh37.tsv.gz"
outfile <- "/mnt/alamo01/users/dengys/Project/jupyter/GWAS_ALS/SALS_Munge.tsv.gz"
logdir  <- "/mnt/alamo01/users/dengys/Project/jupyter/GWAS_ALS/Munge_SALS_logs"
dir.create(logdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# 列名已是标准Catalog命名，直接跑即可
res <- format_sumstats(
  path = infile,
  ref_genome = "GRCh37",
  dbSNP      = "155",   # 你已经安装了 SNPlocs.Hsapiens.dbSNP155.GRCh37
  nThread    = 8,
  imputation_ind = TRUE,
  save_path  = outfile,
  log_folder = logdir
)


```
### 把已经 “Munge” 过的 GWAS 文件，再次加工成 MAGMA 需要的 3 列格式CHR:BP:A1:A2
```{r}
library(data.table)

munge_fp <- "/mnt/alamo01/users/dengys/Project/jupyter/GWAS_ALS/SALS_Munge.tsv.gz"
bim_fp   <- "/mnt/alamo01/users/dengys/Project/jupyter/GWAS/g1000_eur.bim"
out_fp   <- "/mnt/alamo01/users/dengys/Project/jupyter/GWAS_ALS/SALS_for_magma.chr_bp_aa.pval.gz"

# 1) 读入
munge <- fread(munge_fp)                          # 有 CHR BP A1 A2 P N
bim   <- fread(bim_fp, header = FALSE)            # .bim 六列
setnames(bim, c("CHR_bim","SNP_bim","CM","BP_bim","A1_bim","A2_bim"))

# 2) 用 CHR:BP 连接，把 .bim 的 A1/A2 顺序带过来
munge[, CHR := as.integer(CHR)]
munge[, BP  := as.integer(BP)]
munge[, KEY := paste(CHR, BP, sep=":")]
bim[,   KEY := paste(CHR_bim, BP_bim, sep=":")]

x <- merge(munge, bim[, .(KEY, A1_bim, A2_bim)], by="KEY", all.x=TRUE)

# 3) 按 .bim 的等位基因顺序生成 SNP = CHR:BP:A1:A2
x[, SNP := paste(CHR, BP, A1_bim, A2_bim, sep=":")]

# 4) 只保留 MAGMA 需要的三列；N 不在就给常数（你这批是 47571）
if (!"N" %in% names(x) || any(is.na(x$N))) x[, N := 47571L]
dt_out <- x[, .(SNP, P, N)]

# 5) 用 base R 写 gzip（不走 data.table 压缩）
con <- gzfile(out_fp, "w")
write.table(dt_out, con, sep = "\t", row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)
close(con)
```



### 从 MAGMA 输出中取 ZSTAT 最高的 Top 1000 基因生成两个基因集文件 (.gs)
```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(biomaRt)
})

# ===== 1) 读 MAGMA 基因结果，按 ZSTAT 取 top1000 =====
in_file  <- "/mnt/alamo01/users/dengys/Project/jupyter/GWAS_ALS/ALS_gene.genes.out"
out_dir  <- "/mnt/alamo01/users/dengys/Project/jupyter/GWAS_ALS/"
gs_ensg  <- file.path(out_dir, "ALS_top1000.ensg.gs")
gs_sym   <- file.path(out_dir, "ALS_top1000.symbol.gs")

x <- fread(in_file)
stopifnot(all(c("GENE","ZSTAT") %in% names(x)))

# 去掉 NA ZSTAT，按 ZSTAT 降序取前 1000
top <- x[!is.na(ZSTAT)][order(-ZSTAT)][1:1000, .(GENE)]
# 去掉 ENSG 版本号（ENSG00000123456.7 -> ENSG00000123456）
top[, GENE := sub("\\.\\d+$", "", GENE)]
ensg_vec <- unique(top$GENE)

cat(sprintf("[INFO] picked top %d ENSGs by ZSTAT\n", length(ensg_vec)))

# ===== 2) 生成 ENSG 版 .gs（标准格式）=====
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
cat("TRAIT\tGENESET\n", file = gs_ensg)
cat("ALS\t", file = gs_ensg, append = TRUE)
cat(paste(ensg_vec, collapse=","), "\n", file = gs_ensg, append = TRUE)
cat("[OK] wrote ENSG GS -> ", gs_ensg, "\n", sep = "")

# ===== 3) biomaRt 映射 ENSG -> HGNC =====
# 说明：HPC 上外网可能受限；若连接失败，见注释里的本地映射替代方案
mart <- useMart("ensembl", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl")
map <- getBM(
  attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "hgnc_symbol"),
  filters    = "ensembl_gene_id",
  values     = ensg_vec,
  mart       = mart
)

# 清理 & 去重
map$ensembl_gene_id <- sub("\\.\\d+$","", map$ensembl_gene_id)
map <- unique(map[nchar(map$hgnc_symbol) > 0, ])
sym_map <- setNames(map$hgnc_symbol, map$ensembl_gene_id)

symbols <- unname(sym_map[ensg_vec])
mapped  <- sum(!is.na(symbols))
unmapped <- sum(is.na(symbols))
cat(sprintf("[STATS] total=%d, mapped=%d, unmapped=%d\n",
            length(ensg_vec), mapped, unmapped))

# 用 ENSG 填补未映射项，防止空集
symbols[is.na(symbols)] <- ensg_vec[is.na(symbols)]

# 去重保持顺序
symbols <- symbols[!duplicated(symbols)]

# ===== 4) 输出 Symbol 版 .gs（标准格式）=====
cat("TRAIT\tGENESET\n", file = gs_sym)
cat("ALS\t", file = gs_sym, append = TRUE)
cat(paste(symbols, collapse=","), "\n", file = gs_sym, append = TRUE)
cat("[OK] wrote Symbol GS -> ", gs_sym, "\n", sep = "")


```
